title: Adidas x Bad Bunny "BadBo 1.0" Rise Colorway Officially Launches
detail: The third colorway of Bad Bunny's first-ever signature Adidas silhouette — the BadBo 1.0 "Rise" (Off White/Core Black/Gum3, style code JS3886) — officially launches at 10AM ET via the Adidas CONFIRMED app and select global retailers at $160. The drop is accompanied by an apparel capsule of track jackets, sweatsuits, and hats. Prior colorways ("Brown" and "Resilience") sold out instantly; the Brown was reselling for ~$700 on StockX. The BadBo 1.0 is the culmination of Bad Bunny's five-year Adidas partnership.
